Title: User navigates to Arriva raccolta
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user
2. Navigate to the "Arriva raccolta" section
Expected Result: The user is successfully redirected to the "Arriva raccolta" section

Title: User navigates to Aggiungi documento
Preconditions: User is on the "Arriva raccolta" section
Expected Result: The user is successfully redirected to the "Aggiungi documento" section

Title: User navigates to Aggiungi campo
Preconditions: User is on the "Aggiungi documento" section
Expected Result: The user is successfully redirected to the "Aggiungi campo" section

Title: User navigates to Allattamento
Preconditions: User has submitted data in the "Aggiungi campo" section
Expected Result: The user is successfully redirected to the "Allattamento" section

Title: User accesses the footer menu
Test Steps:
1. Scroll to the bottom of the page
2. Click on the footer menu
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the "Monitoring section"

Title: User takes notes in the Monitoring section
Preconditions: User is on the Monitoring section
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Taking notes" button
2. Enter note_text in the text area
3. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: The note is saved, and the user remains on the Monitoring section

Title: User logs in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login screen
2. Enter valid_email@example.com and valid_password
3. Click on the "Sign In" button
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged in

Title: User logs in with invalid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login screen
2. Enter invalid_email@example.com and invalid_password
3. Click on the "Sign In" button
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user remains on the login screen

Title: User creates a family
Test Data: family_name, family_surname, family_email, family_code, family_picture_url, family_birthdate, family_gender
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the family creation screen
2. Enter family_name, family_surname, family_email, family_code, family_picture_url, family_birthdate, family_gender
3. Click on the "Create Family" button
Expected Result: The family is successfully created, and the user is redirected to the family management screen

Title: User edits a note
Preconditions: User is on the note screen with a saved note
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Edit" button next to the note
2. Edit the note text to edited_note_text
3. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: The note is successfully updated, and the user remains on the note screen
